name: hardware-development-butler
description: Safety-first embedded hardware development butler with project onboarding, CubeMX/toolchain discovery, diagnostics, and gated lab workflows.

interface.longDescription: Packages a local hardware development butler for onboarding embedded projects, searching and downloading chip manuals, summarizing datasheet evidence, advising CubeMX pin/peripheral setup, planning FreeRTOS firmware implementation, proposing embeddedskills config, classifying build logs, and keeping build/flash/debug/observe actions behind explicit confirmation-token gates.
defaultPrompt: Safely onboard this CubeMX hardware project.
